mission.title: podman-container-tools: OS X, podman machine time stops sometime
mission.description: OS X, podman machine time stops sometime. This issue affects 33+ users.

steps.title: Identify podman-container-tools troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your podman-container-tools installation:
```bash
podman --version
podman info --format json | jq .version
```
Look for errors or warnings that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review podman-container-tools configuration
steps.description:

steps.title: Apply the fix for OS X, podman machine time stops sometime
steps.description:
I think KVM does this (~ntp~) in "hardware", but it seems to be missing from HVF ?

Might have to run an ntpd in the VM, before it is supported by the virtualization

EDIT: I think I got RTC and NTP confused in my head there.

```
[    0.249404] PM: RTC time: 17:44:05, date: 2021-09-13
[   
```yaml
$ date
Sun Sep 12 15:55:30 MSK 202
```

steps.title: Confirm OS X, podman machine time stops sometime is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
Test podman-container-tools to confirm the issue is resolved.
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
I think KVM does this (~ntp~) in "hardware", but it seems to be missing from HVF ?

Might have to run an ntpd in the VM, before it is supported by the virtualization

EDIT: I think I got RTC and NTP confused in my head there.
